info.title: Ethereal Nature API
info.description: Contract source of truth for storefront and admin (ADR-0004).

get.description: Reports service liveness and database connectivity.
Paginated, filterable catalog listing. Archived products are excluded.

post.summary: Sign in with email and password

get.summary: The authenticated user's cart, priced fresh from the catalog

post.summary: Merge guest cart lines into the server cart
post.description: Sum-then-clamp policy with an adjustments report. Idempotent per mergeId: replaying a processed merge returns the cart unchanged. Client price snapshots are display provenance only — never trusted.

200.description: Merged cart plus adjustments (dropped / clamped / price-changed)

put.summary: Set a line's quantity (0 removes the line)

get.summary: The authenticated user's order history, newest first

post.summary: Place an order from the current cart
post.description: Atomic: final price/stock re-validation, stock decrement, immutable order write, cart cleared — one transaction. Rejected with 409 when the re-validation finds changes (issues, or a total that no longer matches expectedTotalMinor).

409.description: Cart changed since it was displayed — confirm again

post.description: The only mutation an order supports. Transitions are linear (PLACED → PAID → PACKED → SHIPPED); anything else is rejected. Order contents are never editable.

get.summary: Catalog listing for the back office — includes archived products

200.description: One page of products, archived included

post.description: Slug derives from the name at creation and never changes.

put.summary: Update a product's details, price, and stock
put.description: Never touches placed orders — they hold their own snapshots.
Archived products vanish from the public catalog but stay in the back office and in historical order snapshots.

200.description: The product with its new archived state

post.summary: Create (or return the open) payment intent for one of your orders
post.description: Amount and currency are copied from the order server-side. Idempotent while an intent is open: a repeat call returns the existing CREATED intent (200) instead of minting a new one (201).

200.description: The already-open intent for this order

post.description: Settles a payment intent from a provider event. The X-Webhook-Signature header must carry the HMAC-SHA256 of the raw body. Replays of settled events are acknowledged with 200 and left as no-ops.

parameters.name: X-Webhook-Signature
parameters.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex of the raw body

post.summary: Simulate the payment provider settling an intent (dev only)
post.description: Emits a signed PAYMENT_SUCCEEDED or PAYMENT_FAILED event for your own intent through the webhook pipeline. An already-settled intent is a no-op.

200.description: The intent after the simulated outcome
